---

## Overview

> A proprietary machine learning / ai system comprising 33651 integrated source modules.

**propscore redesign** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Vite, TypeScript, React, TailwindCSS.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#0f2027,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#203a43,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#0f2027,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#203a43,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#2c5364,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
propscore-redesign/
  LICENSE
  README.md
  components.json
  eslint.config.js
  index.html
  dist/
    contact-city.jpg
    hero-property.jpg
    index.html
    inspectors-team.jpg
  node_modules/
    .package-lock.json
  public/
  src/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `TypeScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `33651` |
| **Frameworks** | `Vite`, `TypeScript`, `React`, `TailwindCSS` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>@radix-ui/react-collapsible</code>  <code>@eslint/js</code>  <code>@hookform/resolvers</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-hover-card</code>  <code>@gsap/react</code>  <code>eslint-plugin-react-hooks</code>  <code>globals</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-context-menu</code>  <code>@types/react-dom</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-menubar</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-avatar</code>  <code>eslint</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu</code>
</p>
